---
title: mypick
description: "经过自己对比和筛选后留下的选择，通常会和 tools 一起出现。"
page-layout: full
toc: false
body-class: category-page
listing:
  id: category-posts
  contents: [../posts/**/*.qmd, ../pages/**/*.qmd]
  include:
    categories: mypick
  sort: date desc
  feed: true
  fields:
    - date
    - title
    - categories
    - reading-time
  type: table
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
---

:::{#category-posts}
:::
